error_signature: Webhook node defaults to test URL
title: Webhook node using test URL despite active workflow
symptom: The Webhook node continues to use the test URL even when the workflow is active, and the execution mode shows 'test'.
not_this_if: Webhook node is functioning correctly in production
root_cause: The issue may arise from the nginx service not reflecting the updated configuration or environment variables after changes were made. This can lead to the Webhook node defaulting to the test URL instead of the production URL.
fix_steps: Restart the nginx service in your container
Verify that the production URL is correctly set
agent_instruction: Restart the nginx service to ensure the updated configuration is applied.
